title: 02325_Can_MLLMs_Reason_in_Multimodality_EMMA_An_Enhanced_MultiModal_ReAsoning_Benchmark
positive_examples: Improved multimodal reasoning could enhance AI applications in science, engineering, and education, enabling more effective problem-solving and decision-making.
EMMA sets a new standard for evaluating multimodal reasoning, driving future research toward more advanced AI systems.
negative_examples: Persistent gaps in current models’ ability to perform fine-grained visual reasoning, limiting their reliability in high-stakes applications.
Manual selection may introduce unintended biases in question formulation and domain representation.
Potential for misuse in generating deceptive or misleading visual content, raising ethical concerns.
